hero.title:
Gather, Grow,
Blossom.
hero.subtitle: Growing Together is a committed family in Yaoundé. We support youth towards academic excellence, emotional well-being, and social integration.

about.subtitle: Growing Together was born from a simple conviction: no young person should face the storm alone. Our volunteers are themselves young people who give their time and resources.
about.desc: Growing Together is a youth mentoring and empowerment association. We step in where traditional structures and family/social safety nets are too fragile, to educate, support, and help them grow.

solidarity.label: Authentic Solidarity
solidarity.desc: We help each other like a hive, everyone bringing their contribution.

kindness.label: Kindness
kindness.desc: Every young person is welcomed gently, without judgment or conditions.

commitment.label: Volunteer Commitment
commitment.desc: Our members give their personal time and resources.

inclusion.label: Total Inclusion
inclusion.desc: No child left behind: disability, precariousness, vulnerability.

programs.desc: Because every young person is unique, we have developed a 360° approach to meet all needs: education, mental health, and professional future.

school.title: Academic Support
school.desc: School fee funding, school kits, refresher courses, and end-of-year gifts to encourage each child towards excellence.

wellbeing.title: Emotional Well-being
wellbeing.desc: Personalized emotional care and discovery outings.

training.title: Training & Integration
training.desc: Guidance towards internships and employment with our partners.

inclusion.title: Disability Inclusion
inclusion.desc: Specialized support for youth with disabilities. No child left behind.

leadership.title: Leadership & Citizenship
leadership.desc: Community actions to shape the leaders of tomorrow.

gallery.desc: Dive into the daily life of our association. Smiles, learning, and unforgettable moments.

captions.aeroport: This educational outing aimed to allow young people to understand how an airport works, including its various services and the flow of air traffic.
captions.zoo: This educational outing to the zoo aimed to allow students to discover different animal species, observe their behavior, and understand the characteristics of their natural habitat.

impact.desc: Numbers don't tell everything, but they show the strength of our community. Each number represents a life touched and a future transformed.

support.desc: Whether through your time, your skills, or a financial contribution, your support allows Growing Together to continue transforming lives in Yaoundé.

financial.title: Financial Donation
financial.desc: Every franc counts. Your donations directly fund the education, health, and activities of our youth.

volunteer.title: Become a Volunteer
volunteer.desc: Join a dynamic and committed team. Offer your time and skills to mentor the youth.

partner.title: Become a Partner
partner.desc: Companies or institutions, partner with us to co-fund our integration programs.

contact.desc: A question, a desire to collaborate or make a donation? Do not hesitate to send us a message.

footer.rights: © 2025 Growing Together - Youth Mentoring and Empowerment Association, Yaoundé, Cameroon.
